name: UTIL — Cleanup Massa Agente-Off (manual webhook) · v1.0

parameters.query: SELECT tenant_id, clinic_name, chatwoot_url, chatwoot_account_id, chatwoot_inbox_id, telegram_chat_id FROM tenants WHERE status = 'active' AND tenant_id != 'admin-system' AND chatwoot_url IS NOT NULL AND chatwoot_account_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY tenant_id
